untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'bearish higher-highs or lower-lows pattern' which requires multi-bar swing analysis not available in allowed indicators. Also, 'margin buffer depleted to 1 call remaining' is a portfolio-level constraint outside indicator scope. Additionally, '21-period SMA is flat or declining only slightly' requires slope/trend calculation which is not supported by allowed operators.
translation_notes: Translated core mean-reversion entry conditions: RSI oversold at <25 and weak trend (ADX <20). SMA condition simplified to price above SMA_20 as proxy for non-declining trend. Exit on ADX >25 indicates trend strengthening. Stop loss set at 1.5% per specification. Regime set to RANGING/ANY to reflect avoidance of trending markets. Pattern detection and margin constraints flagged as untranslatable.
